channel.title: Pages on Prince 2 lu's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Prince 2 lu's blog

item.description: Student at Ecole 2600, Apprentice at the Oppida lab in reverse engineering. You can find here some writeup about nice challenge that I have been able to do over time during ctf. Majoritary about reverse engineering challenges Feel free to contact me Formally at p2lu@proton.me Also in discord prince2lu (Social media also linked) Note: some writeups are relatively old and maybe imprecise
